creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Coffee and yap in this cool spot! 🤎

📍 @25hourshoteldubai 

We absolutely couldn’t get enough of this quirky hotel in Dubai. There’s Nomad Day Bar in the lobby where you can grab coffee and bites, a colorful courtyard, a mini library, and a work space.

While you’re there, don’t forget to drop by Analogue Circus and dive into nostalgia. They have a collection of vinyl records and vintage entertainment.

Tag your besties!

👗 from @loveth_cs

transcription.text: I've got sunshine on a cloudy day When it's cold outside
